channel.title: Comments on: Saint Arnold Christmas Ale, Ep. 120
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Thanks Kendra and Buddy and thanks Scott as well for commenting! You all have a wonderful holiday season as well!!
Paul
item.content:encoded:
Thanks Kendra and Buddy and thanks Scott as well for commenting! You all have a wonderful holiday season as well!!

Paul

item.title: By: Kendra and Buddy Eggleton
item.dc:creator: Kendra and Buddy Eggleton
item.description: Thanks for this insight into another great beer. Wishing you all all a joyous Christmas and a prosperous New Year
item.content:encoded: Thanks for this insight into another great beer. Wishing you all all a joyous Christmas and a prosperous New Year

item.title: By: Scott
item.dc:creator: Scott
item.description:
I have never had anything from Saint Arnold, looks good.
Going on what John was talking about, i think every beer should have to put the ABV on the bottle (or can). I hate when its not there.
Thanks guys
item.content:encoded:
I have never had anything from Saint Arnold, looks good.

Going on what John was talking about, i think every beer should have to put the ABV on the bottle (or can). I hate when its not there.

Thanks guys
